calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Jackson Group Property Management, represented by agent: Ray Scarabosio.
Jason Erlich, Esq., for and with the Defendant(s): Edward Barrios Tabora.
The Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207 for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for Entry of Future Judgment" which was filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JONATHAN BORNSTEIN OF THE LAW OFFICES OF BORNSTEIN & BORNSTEIN, TEL. NO. 409-7611 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT EDWARD TABORA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 5 DAYS TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Maria Viscio , CSR # 12353 =301/PHA
